You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/openshift-servicemesh-plugin/source/plugin/src/kiali/components/IstioActions/IstioActionsDropdown.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 6 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 79
Rule [family:Dropdown]:
## Dropdown Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Dropdown activeItemId={...} activeMenu={...} containsDrilldown={...} containsFlyout={...} drilldownItemPath={...} drilledInMenus={...} focusTimeoutDelay={...} id={...}>
    <DropdownList isAriaMultiselectable={...}>
      <DropdownItem actions={...} component={...} description={...} direction={...} download={...} drilldownMenu={...} flyoutMenu={...} hasCheckbox={...}>
        <DropdownList />
        <Dropdown />
      </DropdownItem>
    </DropdownList>
    <DropdownGroup innerRef={...} label={...} labelHeadingLevel={...} titleId={...} />
  </Dropdown>
```

Props that stay on <Dropdown>: activeItemId, activeMenu, containsDrilldown, containsFlyout, drilldownItemPath, drilledInMenus, focusTimeoutDelay, id, innerRef, isMenuDrilledIn, isNavFlyout, isOpen, isPlain, isRootMenu, isScrollable, maxMenuHeight, menuHeight, onActionClick, onDrillIn, onDrillOut, onGetMenuHeight, onOpenChange, onOpenChangeKeys, onSelect, onToggleKeydown, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, parentMenu, popperProps, role, selected, shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen, shouldFocusToggleOnSelect, shouldPreventScrollOnItemFocus, toggle, zIndex

Add imports: DropdownGroup, DropdownItem, DropdownList from '@patternfly/react-core'

Prop type changes:
  DropdownGroup.label: string -> React.ReactNode
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: DropdownItemProps['value']) => void
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: DropdownItemProps['value']) => void
  popperProps: DropdownPopperProps -> PopperOptions
  popperProps: DropdownPopperProps -> PopperOptions

Rule [family:Modal]:
## Modal Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Modal appendTo={...} backdropClassName={...} disableFocusTrap={...} elementToFocus={...} id={...} isOpen={...} maxWidth={...} onClose={...}>
    <ModalBody role={...} />
    <ModalHeader description={...} descriptorId={...} help={...} labelId={...} title={...} titleIconVariant={...} titleScreenReaderText={...} />
    <ModalFooter />
  </Modal>
```

Props that stay on <Modal>: appendTo, backdropClassName, disableFocusTrap, elementToFocus, id, isOpen, maxWidth, onClose, onEscapePress, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, position, positionOffset, variant, width

  description -> <ModalHeader />
  help -> <ModalHeader />
  title -> <ModalHeader />
  titleIconVariant -> <ModalHeader />

  bodyAriaRole -> ModalBody (as children, string)
  footer -> ModalFooter (as children, ReactNode)
  hasNoBodyWrapper -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  header -> ModalHeader (as children, ReactNode)
  showClose -> map to appropriate child component (boolean)
  titleLabel -> map to appropriate child component (string)

Removed children (no longer valid JSX): ModalBoxCloseButton, ModalContent, ModalBox, ModalBoxBody, ModalBoxHeader, ModalBoxFooter

### Fix 3
Line: 68
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Dropdown

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   67          toggle={(toggleRef: React.Ref<MenuToggleElement>) => (
   68            <MenuToggle
   69              ref={toggleRef}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 5
Rule [sd-test-dropdown-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Dropdown is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Dropdown renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Dropdown may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Dropdown
  localName: Dropdown
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
    4    ButtonVariant,
    5    Dropdown,
    6    DropdownItem,

```

  Matching props (use on `ContentVariants` instead): a, blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, pre, small

Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Strategy: LlmAssisted

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/openshift-servicemesh-plugin/source/plugin/src/kiali/components/IstioActions/IstioActionsDropdown.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current state of the code.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Dropdown - line 79-82):
- **`onSelect` type change**: The current `onSelect` callback at line 30 takes no args `() => {...}`. The type changed from `(event?, value?: string | number)` to `(event?, value?: DropdownItemProps['value'])`. Since the actual callback ignores both params, no functional change needed.
- **`popperProps` type change**: `DropdownPopperProps` → `PopperOptions`. The `position` property name should still work in `PopperOptions`. No change needed for the value.
- **`DropdownList` must contain `DropdownItem`**: Line 82 `<DropdownList>{[deleteActionWrapper]}</DropdownList>` - `deleteActionWrapper` is already a `DropdownItem` (line 54), so this is already correct. No change needed.

The Dropdown component is already using the v6 API (it has `toggle`, `onOpenChange`, `DropdownList`, `DropdownItem`). These are already applied.

### Fix 2 (Modal - line 86):
- **`title` prop** must move to `<ModalHeader>` child
- **`actions` prop** must move to `<ModalFooter>` child
- **Children** (`<Text>`) must be wrapped in `<ModalBody>`
- Need to add imports: `ModalBody`, `ModalHeader`, `ModalFooter`

### Fix 3 (MenuToggle icon - line 68):
- The `<MenuToggle>` at line 68 contains "Actions" text only, no icon element. The rule says to move icon children to `icon` prop, but there's no icon here. No change needed.

### Fix 4 (Dropdown behavioral test changes - line 5):
- This is informational about test files needing updates. No code change to the main file.

### Fix 5 (TextVariants → ContentVariants - line 13):
- Replace `TextVariants` import with `ContentVariants`
- Update usage at line 99: `TextVariants.p` → `ContentVariants.p`

### Fix 6 (Text → Content - line 12):
- Replace `Text` import with `Content`
- Update usage at line 99: `<Text component={...}>` → `<Content component={...}>`

Now let me apply all changes:
The file looks correct. All changes have been applied properly. Let me verify there are no leftover references to removed imports:

Good — no remaining references to the old `Text` or `TextVariants` identifiers. The file is clean.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Dropdown family migration (line 79)
**Already applied / no change needed.** The Dropdown was already using the v6 API (`toggle` render prop, `onOpenChange`, `DropdownList`, `DropdownItem`). The `onSelect` callback takes no arguments so the type change is compatible. `popperProps` value `{ position: 'right' }` is valid for `PopperOptions`. `DropdownList` already contains a `DropdownItem` via `deleteActionWrapper`.

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration (line 86)
**Applied.** 
- Removed `title="Confirm Delete"` prop from `<Modal>` → added `<ModalHeader title="Confirm Delete" />` as first child.
- Removed `actions={[...]}` prop from `<Modal>` → moved the two `<Button>` elements into a new `<ModalFooter>` child.
- Wrapped the existing `<Text>`/`<Content>` body content in `<ModalBody>`.
- Added `ModalBody`, `ModalFooter`, `ModalHeader` to the import statement.

### Fix 3 — MenuToggle icon-to-prop (line 68)
**No change needed.** The `<MenuToggle>` contains only the text "Actions" — there is no icon element to move to the `icon` prop.

### Fix 4 — Dropdown transitive behavioral test changes (line 5)
**No change needed.** This is an informational/test-related advisory. No companion test files were listed, so no test changes apply.

### Fix 5 — TextVariants → ContentVariants (line 13)
**Applied.**
- Replaced `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants` in the import statement.
- Updated usage: `TextVariants.p` → `ContentVariants.p` (line 95 in the new file).

### Fix 6 — Text → Content (line 12)
**Applied.**
- Replaced `Text` with `Content` in the import statement.
- Updated JSX: `<Text component={...}>` → `<Content component={...}>` and `</Text>` → `</Content>`.

### Fix 3
Line: 68
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>
